title: Roguecraft Evolved
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f240b7ba613b967fe4d0f7fa16177e8b5b8e1c1d_0.webp)

**Roguecraft Evolved** is a lightweight Minecraft modpack that builds on the *Roguecraft* datapack, offering a roguelike experience with better world generation, challenging enemies, and improved progression. Every mod has been carefully chosen to enhance difficulty, world variety, and gameplay mechanics, while custom resource packs and shaders provide a better visual experience. Designed for players who want to enjoy *Roguecraft* but with enhancements you've grown used to in modded Minecraft.

Uses the Datapack and Resources from Roguecraft by MonoCode which can be found here: [https://modrinth.com/datapack/rogue-craft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rogue-craft)
